problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photonic. Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
